evals.prompt: I have a folder called Downloads with a bunch of duplicate images and files scattered everywhere. I want to find all the duplicates by both filename and content, see what you'd move first (dry run), then move them to a dated Duplicates folder organized by type. Show me the report when done.
evals.expected_output: Dry run showing files to be moved, confirmation step, then files moved into Duplicates-[DATE]/ with subfolders (Images, Videos, Documents, etc.) and a JSON report

evals.prompt: Find duplicates in my Documents folder but only check for files with the same name in different places. I don't need full content hashing, just the quick filename match. Then move them.
evals.expected_output: Filename-only duplicate detection, dry run, files moved to Duplicates-[DATE]/Documents/

evals.prompt: Scan my entire Dropbox Design Projects folder for duplicates. I have thousands of files. Show me the dry run, then ask before moving anything.
evals.expected_output: Dry run report showing total files scanned, duplicates found by category, space savings, confirmation prompt before moving
